To continue our reasoning:

However, there isn't exclusive correlation making it a unique identifier for any one specific tumor type given the wide spectrum across germ cell tumors.
For ovarian masses, LDH elevation could occur in multiple contexts - e.g., advanced stages of epithelial ovarian cancer might elevate LDH alongside other markers though it remains relatively nonspecific. But importantly, none of the references indicate that LDH elevation rules out consideration of other possibilities entirely just because it doesn’t match expected patterns seen in typical cases.
